pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on JDK 21; keeping version 17 would result in a mismatch with the target runtime environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the unified release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in newer compiler plugin versions and JDKs; using 'release' is required for correct cross-compilation and module path handling in JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the compiler plugin may fail to compile code targeting JDK 21 or lack support for new language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-war-plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the war plugin may fail to build WAR files on JDK 21 due to internal API changes or classloading issues.
